economic_notes: Government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Ojibway Paradise Resort, Bingo Palace, 1157065 Ontario Inc. (o/a Eagle Lake Contractors), Migisi Logging, Recreation (Arena) Operations, Concession Operation.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021. Six government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis (not consolidated line-by-line). Net debt position of $2,446,303. Incomplete projects liability of $7,301,838 represents deferred funding held in cash. Restricted cash of $318,861 includes Replacement Reserve Fund ($130,076) and Operating Surplus Fund ($188,785). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,629,852) + Health Canada ($2,239,427) + Province of Ontario ($2,664,986) + CMHC rental subsidies ($146,057) = $9,680,322; however Federal Government - other ($2,680,707) may include non-government amounts so conservative estimate used. OSR estimated as Other revenue ($2,159,768) minus business enterprises net loss ($40,534) plus gain on disposal ($45,000) minus net transfer to incomplete projects ($3,245,857) which nets to negative; revenue lines reflect the statement as presented. No remuneration schedule found in extracted text.
